TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there are at least 2 elements to perform a reversal
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Operation: reverse subarray from index a to b (bounds‑checked)
    int a = 0;                         // start index (can be adjusted as needed)
    int b = follow_case.n - 1;         // end index (must satisfy a < b)
    if (a < 0) a = 0;
    if (b >= follow_case.n) b = follow_case.n - 1;
    while (a < b) {
        double temp = follow_case.elements[a];
        follow_case.elements[a] = follow_case.elements[b];
        follow_case.elements[b] = temp;
        ++a;
        --b;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
